game_info.title: Sky Doodle
game_info.concept:
The most addictive game on the App Store is all new with delightful new environments, the cutest new characters, fun new platform challenges and some silly new monsters.

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/doodle-jump-2/id1542340137

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

The most addictive game on the App Store is all new with delightful new environments, the cutest new characters, fun new platform challenges and some silly new monsters.

Jump up on platforms and collect stars to unlock cool new characters and exciting new environments. 

Unlock all the levels and collect all the characters! Beat your friends’ high scores and become the new Doodle Jump King!

FEATURES

- Cavemen world with T-rex, triceratops, falling stones, prehistoric turtles…

- Desert world with quicksand, genie, scorpions, desert monsters…

- Sleepy world with ba-ba sheep monsters, pillow monsters, fireflies, pillow platforms…

- Aviator world with helicopters, jet platforms, propeller platforms…

- Space world with moon cheese platforms, platform eating monsters, starships, robots, rocket cyclops…

- Rainy world with mud and puddle platforms, rainstorm, raincoat monsters…

- Disco world with disco platforms, disco ball monsters…
game_info.description:
Welcome to **Sky Doodle**, an infinite vertical platformer! You are a bouncy alien creature determined to reach the stars. Jump from platform to platform, avoid menacing monsters, and collect star crystals to boost your score. The higher you climb, the stranger the worlds become—from grassy knolls to deep space and stormy skies!

The world scrolls automatically as you climb. If you fall off the bottom of the screen, it's Game Over. Watch out for broken platforms that crumble under your feet and monsters that patrol the skies.
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Left / Arrow Right: Move the character horizontally.
- Space: Shoot projectiles upwards to defeat monsters.
- R: Restart the game (from Game Over screen).
- Enter: Start the game.
- Esc: Pause / Unpause the game.

TEST_1.test_description: Basic Survival Test. The goal is to verify that the player character can successfully navigate platforms and climb upwards without falling immediately.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The automated controller will calculate the position of the nearest safe platform above the player. It will simulate Left or Right Arrow key presses to align the player's horizontal position with that target platform.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player should survive for at least 10 seconds and achieve a score greater than 500, proving basic movement and collision physics are functional.

TEST_2.test_description: Combat and Evasion Test. The goal is to verify the shooting mechanic and monster interaction.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The controller will behave like TEST_1 but will actively press Space (Shoot) if an enemy entity is detected within a vertical range above the player. It will attempt to destroy obstacles while climbing.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player should successfully destroy at least one enemy or survive passing one, and reach a score comparable to TEST_1, ensuring combat doesn't break movement.
